    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    ReactiveChangeStreamOperation.ChangeStreamWithFilterAndProjection<T>
    Provide a filter for limiting results (optional).
    static interface 
    ReactiveChangeStreamOperation.ReactiveChangeStream<T>
    ReactiveChangeStreamOperation.ReactiveChangeStream provides methods for constructing change stream operations in a fluent way.
    static interface 
    ReactiveChangeStreamOperation.ResumingChangeStream<T>
    Resume a change stream.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReactiveChangeStreamOperation.TerminatingChangeStream<T>
    ReactiveChangeStreamOperation.ResumingChangeStream.resumeAfter(Object token)
    Resume the change stream after a given point.
    ReactiveChangeStreamOperation.TerminatingChangeStream<T>
    ReactiveChangeStreamOperation.ResumingChangeStream.resumeAt(Object token)
    Resume the change stream at a given point.

    ReactiveChangeStreamOperation.ResumingChangeStream.startAfter(Object token)
